what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links the design-source channel to an image asset located at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-29.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Attachment id att-25737e77 matches the filename
target is an image:// URI under capital-raise/p-29
standouts: References an image asset in the capital-raise path
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Filename corresponds to the attachment id
Empty body after the frontmatter delimiter
concerns: No caption, title, or description of the image
No author or provenance beyond a timestamp
Target URI scheme is not validated or explained in the file
notes: A bare attachment stub that points a design-source channel entry to a capital-raise image asset.
questions: Who added this attachment and for what decision?

purpose_vs_actual: The file states no explicit purpose beyond its fields; it functions as a typed, timestamped pointer to an image asset, which matches the metadata structure.
intention_signals: It appears to register an image from the design-source channel into the channel memory ledger so it can be retrieved as part of the capital-raise design package.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel and an image asset, supporting retrieval and audit of design artifacts in a fused system.
